subject: FAR
title: 企業結合・連結会計（のれんと非支配持分）
scenario:
Parent Corp. は Year 1 の **1月1日**に、Sub Corp. の発行済み普通株式の **80%** を **$480,000** で取得し、支配を獲得しました。

取得日・Year 1 のデータは **Exhibit 1** と **Exhibit 2** を参照してください。なお、**全額のれん法（Full Goodwill Method）**を適用します。

exhibits.title: Exhibit 1: 取得日（Year 1 1/1）のデータ
exhibits.content:
**Sub Corp. の純資産（取得日）**

| 項目 | 帳簿価額 | 公正価値 |
|---|---|---|
| 識別可能な純資産合計 | $500,000 | $500,000 |

※ 帳簿価額 = 公正価値（資産・負債の評価差額なし）

**支配株主の投資額**

| 項目 | 金額 |
|---|---|
| 取得対価（移転した対価） | $480,000 |
| 取得株式割合 | 80% |
| 非支配持分（NCI）割合 | 20% |

exhibits.title: Exhibit 2: Year 1 の追加情報
exhibits.content:
| 項目 | 金額 |
|---|---|
| Sub Corp. の Year 1 純利益 | $80,000 |
| Sub Corp. が支払った配当 | $30,000 |
| 親子会社間の内部取引 | なし |
| のれんの減損 | なし |

**全額のれん法（Full Goodwill Method）**: 非支配持分を被取得企業の純資産の公正価値に基づいて測定する（US GAAP の原則）。

tasks.title: のれんの認識額
tasks.instruction: ASC 805 の**全額のれん法**に基づき、取得日（Year 1 1/1）に認識する**のれん（Goodwill）**の金額を計算してください（単位: ドル、端数なし）。
tasks.explanation: Under the full goodwill method: NCI = $500,000 × 20% = $100,000. Goodwill = Consideration transferred + NCI − Fair value of net assets = $480,000 + $100,000 − $500,000 = $80,000.
tasks.explanationJa:
全額のれん法では:

①非支配持分（NCI）= 純資産公正価値 × NCI割合
= $500,000 × 20% = **$100,000**

②のれん = 取得対価 + NCI − 純資産公正価値
= $480,000 + $100,000 − $500,000 = **$80,000**

全額のれん法ではのれん全体（親会社帰属分 + NCI帰属分）を認識します。

tasks.title: NCI に帰属する純利益
tasks.instruction: Year 1 の連結損益計算書において、**非支配持分（NCI）に帰属する純利益**はいくらですか（単位: ドル、端数なし）。
tasks.explanation: NCI's share of net income = Sub Corp. net income × NCI% = $80,000 × 20% = $16,000.
tasks.explanationJa:
NCI 帰属純利益 = Sub Corp. 純利益 × NCI 割合
= $80,000 × 20% = **$16,000**

連結損益計算書では、当期純利益を「親会社株主帰属分」と「非支配持分帰属分」に区分表示します。

tasks.title: Year 1 末の NCI 残高
tasks.instruction: Year 1 末（12月31日）の連結貸借対照表における**非支配持分（NCI）の残高**を計算してください（単位: ドル、端数なし）。
tasks.explanation: Beginning NCI = $100,000. NCI's share of net income = $16,000. NCI's share of dividends = $30,000 × 20% = $6,000. Ending NCI = $100,000 + $16,000 − $6,000 = $110,000.

tasks.title: US GAAP のれんの事後処理
tasks.instruction: US GAAP（ASC 350）の下で、のれんの事後測定として正しい処理はどれですか？
options: 減損テストを毎年実施し、償却は行わない
耐用年数（最長40年）にわたって定額償却する
tasks.correctAnswer: 減損テストを毎年実施し、償却は行わない
tasks.explanation: Under US GAAP (ASC 350), goodwill is not amortized but is tested for impairment at least annually (or more frequently if triggering events occur). This differs from IFRS, which also prohibits amortization, and from prior US GAAP (APB 17) which required amortization over up to 40 years.
tasks.explanationJa:
**US GAAP（ASC 350）**: のれんは**償却せず**、少なくとも**年1回の減損テスト**を実施します。

- 旧US GAAP（APB 17）: 最長40年で定額償却（廃止済み）
- IFRS（IAS 36）: 減損テストのみ（US GAAPと同様、償却なし）

のれんの償却廃止は SFAS 142（現 ASC 350）により Year 2002 から適用されました。

subject: FAR
title: Consolidation: Intercompany Eliminations and Noncontrolling Interest
scenario:
Pinnacle Industries, Inc. owns 80% of the outstanding common stock of Stratton Manufacturing Co. Pinnacle acquired its interest on January 1, Year 1, and at that date the carrying amounts of Stratton's identifiable assets and liabilities equaled their fair values.

Pinnacle is preparing consolidated financial statements for the year ended December 31, Year 3. Separate-company income statement data appear in **Exhibit 1**. Details of intercompany transactions during Year 3 appear in **Exhibit 2**. Selected separate-company balance sheet data at December 31, Year 3 appear in **Exhibit 3**.

Use the information in the exhibits to complete the tasks that follow.

exhibits.title: Exhibit 1: Separate-Company Income Statement Data — Year Ended December 31, Year 3
exhibits.content:
| Item | Pinnacle | Stratton |
|---|---|---|
| Sales | $5,200,000 | $2,100,000 |
| Cost of goods sold | $3,380,000 | $1,260,000 |
| Operating expenses | $1,180,000 | $590,000 |
| **Net income** | **$640,000** | **$250,000** |

Pinnacle's amounts above exclude any investment income related to Stratton. Pinnacle's sales include all merchandise sold to Stratton during Year 3.

exhibits.title: Exhibit 2: Intercompany Transactions — Year 3
exhibits.content:
- During Year 3, Pinnacle sold merchandise to Stratton for **$400,000**. Pinnacle's cost for this merchandise was **$300,000** (a gross profit of 25% on the selling price).
- At December 31, Year 3, Stratton's inventory included **$120,000** of merchandise purchased from Pinnacle, carried at Stratton's cost (Pinnacle's transfer price).
- Neither company's inventory at January 1, Year 3 included any intercompany merchandise.
- At December 31, Year 3, Stratton owed Pinnacle **$75,000** on open account for these purchases.
- Stratton made no sales to Pinnacle during Year 3.
- Stratton declared and paid dividends of $60,000 during Year 3.

exhibits.title: Exhibit 3: Selected Separate-Company Balance Sheet Data — December 31, Year 3
exhibits.content:
| Item | Pinnacle | Stratton |
|---|---|---|
| Cash | $410,000 | $180,000 |
| Accounts receivable, net | $930,000 | $460,000 |
| Inventory | $860,000 | $540,000 |
| Property, plant, and equipment, net | $2,750,000 | $1,340,000 |
| Accounts payable | $720,000 | $610,000 |
| Note payable to bank, due Year 6 | $500,000 | — |

Pinnacle's accounts receivable includes the $75,000 due from Stratton, and Stratton's accounts payable includes the $75,000 due to Pinnacle. Stratton's inventory includes the $120,000 of merchandise purchased from Pinnacle. During Year 3, Stratton also purchased production equipment from an unrelated vendor for $95,000.

tasks.title: Elimination of Intercompany Sales
tasks.instruction: Refer to Exhibit 2. Determine the amount of intercompany sales that must be eliminated in preparing the Year 3 consolidated income statement (in whole dollars, no commas).
tasks.explanation: All intercompany sales are eliminated in full, regardless of the parent's ownership percentage. Pinnacle sold $400,000 of merchandise to Stratton during Year 3, so $400,000 of sales (and the related intercompany purchases within cost of goods sold) is eliminated. The 80% ownership interest does not reduce the elimination.
tasks.explanationJa:
内部売上の消去は、持分割合に関係なく**全額（100%）**行います。

- 消去額 = Year 3 の親→子 商品販売額 = **$400,000**
- 消去仕訳のイメージ: 売上高 $400,000 / 売上原価（内部仕入） $400,000
- 「80%所有だから $320,000 だけ消去」という処理は誤り。連結は経済的単一体として作成するため、内部取引は全額消去します。

tasks.title: Unrealized Profit in Ending Inventory
tasks.instruction: Refer to Exhibit 2. Calculate the intercompany profit in Stratton's December 31, Year 3 inventory that must be eliminated in consolidation (in whole dollars, no commas).
tasks.explanation: Pinnacle's gross profit rate on the intercompany sales is 25% of the selling price ($100,000 gross profit ÷ $400,000 sales). Stratton still holds $120,000 of this merchandise at year-end, carried at the transfer price. Unrealized profit to eliminate = $120,000 × 25% = $30,000. The elimination reduces ending inventory and increases consolidated cost of goods sold. Note that Pinnacle's overall gross profit rate on total sales (35%) is not used; the rate on the intercompany merchandise governs.
tasks.explanationJa:
期末在庫に含まれる未実現利益を消去します。

1. **内部販売の売上総利益率** = ($400,000 − $300,000) ÷ $400,000 = **25%**（売価基準）
2. **子会社の期末在庫のうち内部仕入分** = $120,000（移転価格ベース）
3. **未実現利益** = $120,000 × 25% = **$30,000**

消去により連結棚卸資産を $30,000 減額し、連結売上原価を $30,000 増額します。Pinnacle の会社全体の売上総利益率（35%）ではなく、**内部販売分の利益率 25%** を使う点に注意してください。

tasks.title: Consolidated Sales
tasks.instruction: Refer to Exhibits 1 and 2. Calculate consolidated sales for the year ended December 31, Year 3 (in whole dollars, no commas).
tasks.explanation: Consolidated sales = Pinnacle's sales + Stratton's sales − intercompany sales = $5,200,000 + $2,100,000 − $400,000 = $6,900,000. Only sales to parties outside the consolidated group are reported.
tasks.explanationJa:
連結売上高 = 親会社売上高 + 子会社売上高 − 内部売上高

| 項目 | 金額 |
|---|---|
| Pinnacle 売上高 | $5,200,000 |
| Stratton 売上高 | $2,100,000 |
| 内部売上の消去 | ($400,000) |
| **連結売上高** | **$6,900,000** |

連結グループ外部への売上のみが連結売上高として報告されます。

tasks.title: Consolidated Inventory
tasks.instruction: Refer to Exhibits 2 and 3. Calculate consolidated inventory at December 31, Year 3 (in whole dollars, no commas).
tasks.explanation: Consolidated inventory = Pinnacle's inventory + Stratton's inventory − unrealized intercompany profit in ending inventory = $860,000 + $540,000 − $30,000 = $1,370,000. The elimination restates the $120,000 of intercompany merchandise held by Stratton to its original cost to the consolidated group of $90,000.
tasks.explanationJa:
連結棚卸資産 = 親会社棚卸資産 + 子会社棚卸資産 − 期末在庫の未実現利益

| 項目 | 金額 |
|---|---|
| Pinnacle 棚卸資産 | $860,000 |
| Stratton 棚卸資産 | $540,000 |
| 未実現利益の消去（Work Tab 2） | ($30,000) |
| **連結棚卸資産** | **$1,370,000** |

消去後、Stratton が保有する内部仕入在庫 $120,000 は連結グループにとっての原価 $90,000（= $120,000 × 75%）で表示されることになります。

tasks.title: Effect of Downstream Profit on Noncontrolling Interest
tasks.instruction: Pinnacle's sales to Stratton are downstream transactions. Which statement best describes how the unrealized intercompany profit in ending inventory affects the attribution of Year 3 consolidated net income?
options: The entire unrealized profit is deducted in determining net income attributable to the parent; net income attributable to the noncontrolling interest is unaffected
The unrealized profit is allocated 80% to the parent and 20% to the noncontrolling interest based on ownership percentages
The entire unrealized profit is deducted from net income attributable to the noncontrolling interest
No elimination is required because the merchandise was sold at arm's-length prices
tasks.correctAnswer: The entire unrealized profit is deducted in determining net income attributable to the parent; net income attributable to the noncontrolling interest is unaffected
tasks.explanation: In a downstream sale, the intercompany profit is recorded on the parent's books. The full amount of unrealized profit is eliminated in consolidation, and because the profit resides in the parent's separate income, the entire elimination is borne by the parent. The noncontrolling interest's share of consolidated net income is based on the subsidiary's income, which contains no intercompany profit from downstream sales.
tasks.explanationJa:
ダウンストリーム（親→子）販売の未実現利益の帰属がポイントです。

- 未実現利益 $30,000 は**親会社の個別損益**に計上されている
- 消去自体は全額行うが、その負担は**すべて親会社帰属分**から控除される
- NCI帰属純利益は**子会社の純利益**を基礎とするため、ダウンストリーム取引の未実現利益の影響を受けない

逆にアップストリーム（子→親）販売の場合は、未実現利益が子会社の利益に含まれるため、消去額を持分比率（80%/20%）で親会社とNCIに配分します。この対比を必ず押さえてください。

tasks.title: Net Income Attributable to the Noncontrolling Interest
tasks.instruction: Refer to Exhibits 1 and 2. Calculate net income attributable to the noncontrolling interest for the year ended December 31, Year 3 (in whole dollars, no commas).
tasks.explanation: Because the intercompany sales are downstream, the unrealized profit elimination does not affect the noncontrolling interest. Net income attributable to the noncontrolling interest = Stratton's net income × 20% = $250,000 × 20% = $50,000. The $30,000 unrealized profit is deducted entirely from the parent's share of consolidated net income.
tasks.explanationJa:
NCI帰属純利益の計算です。

1. 内部販売は**ダウンストリーム**なので、未実現利益 $30,000 の消去は NCI に影響しない（Work Tab 5）
2. NCI帰属純利益 = 子会社純利益 × NCI持分割合
3. = $250,000 × 20% = **$50,000**

仮にアップストリームだった場合は ($250,000 − $30,000) × 20% = $44,000 となるところですが、本問はダウンストリームのため調整不要です。

tasks.title: Elimination Entry for Intercompany Receivable and Payable
tasks.instruction: Refer to Exhibits 2 and 3. Prepare the consolidation elimination entry at December 31, Year 3 for the intercompany open-account balance between Pinnacle and Stratton. Enter amounts in whole dollars, no commas. Enter 0 in cells that should have no amount.
tasks.explanation: Intercompany balances are eliminated in full so that the consolidated balance sheet reports only amounts due to and from parties outside the group. The entry debits accounts payable (removing Stratton's $75,000 payable to Pinnacle) and credits accounts receivable (removing Pinnacle's $75,000 receivable from Stratton). The elimination is 100% of the balance even though Pinnacle owns only 80% of Stratton.
tasks.explanationJa:
内部債権債務の消去仕訳です。

| 勘定科目 | 借方 | 貸方 |
|---|---|---|
| 買掛金（Accounts payable） | $75,000 | 0 |
| 売掛金（Accounts receivable） | 0 | $75,000 |

- Stratton の買掛金に含まれる Pinnacle 宛 $75,000 を借方で消去
- Pinnacle の売掛金に含まれる Stratton 宛 $75,000 を貸方で消去
- 内部売上と同様、持分割合（80%）にかかわらず**全額消去**します
